name: Course Content Simplification Agent
description: AI-powered academic content simplifier using IBM watsonx.ai and IBM Granite Foundation Models

WATSONX_API_KEY.description: Your IBM Cloud API key for watsonx.ai authentication

SECRET_KEY.description: Flask secret key for session security. Generate with: python -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_hex(32))"

MAX_NEW_TOKENS.description: Maximum tokens to generate per AI response
